series_metadata.series_description: Documents the destruction of Ohio Attorney General (AGO)-owned data outputs or extracts received by requesting government agencies or other entities from the AGO per the terms of an memorandum of understanding or contract. Records include information on, but is not limited to, description of information destroyed, date of destruction, description of destruction method, individuals and witnesses involved in the destruction, as well as information regarding vendors used in destruction process.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain permanently, unless printed or microfilmed. ; Paper: If in paper, retain permanently, unless microfilmed. ; Microform: If microfilmed, retain permanently., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred ; Microform: Permanent
